case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. SIOBHAN O'BOYLE ET AL

LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS, TRANSFERRED TO LAW AND MOTION ON JAN-08-2025, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301. =(302/VMH)

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT SIOBHAN O'BOYLE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS. SPECIALLY-APPEARING SIOBHAN O'BOYLE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE, WHICH IS UNOPPOSED, IS GRANTED. O'BOYLE CARRIED HER BURDEN AND PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC HAS FAILED TO SHOW VALID SERVICE OF THE COMPLAINT AND SUMMONS. THUS, AT THIS TIME, THE COURT IS WITHOUT JURISDICTION OVER O'BOYLE FOR PURPOSES OF THIS ACTION. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (301/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq. specially appeared for the plaintiff. Pursuant to plaintiff's request, the court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk: D. Diaz; Not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2025 Continued To Sep-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SIOBHAN O'BOYLE'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS.

Specially-appearing Siobhan O'Boyle's motion to quash service, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. O'Boyle carried her burden and Plaintiff LVNV Funding LLC has failed to show valid service of the complaint and summons. Thus, at this time, the court is without jurisdiction over O'Boyle for purposes of this action.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (301/JMQ)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Dec-23-2024 Continued To Jan-08-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
